title.en: In the blink of an eye, the 160,000 years of th...

content.en:
Completing a tempering of the Pagoda of Will didn't help Ye Tian's strength much, only a slight improvement.

However, if the Will Pagoda is tempered nine times, there will be a huge improvement, it is a semi-breakthrough in the realm, reaching the half-step fivefold ancestor realm, and the strength will increase by leaps and bounds.

Whether it is the will of the Extreme Dao, or the body of the original ancestor, or the power of the original ancestor, it will usher in a metamorphosis.

This is also the reason why the half-step five-fold primordial ancestor is much stronger than the four-fold peak primordial ancestor.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to refine the Will Pagoda, and the more times the Will Pagoda was refined, the more difficult it would be.

In the blink of an eye, the 160,000 years of the Origin Domain Era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally refined the Will Pagoda nine times, and successfully stepped into the half-step fivefold original ancestor realm.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to transform, and his strength increased tremendously.

"Breakthrough, half-step fivefold ancestor, but only nine tempering times is far from enough, I must continue to refine the Will Pagoda, tempering to the point where I can't temper it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had also consulted those Fivefold Ancestors, and the number of times he had refined the Will Pagoda had nothing to do with the number of Extreme Extreme Paths he had attained.

It is impossible for him to comprehend three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, so he has to refine three hundred and sixty-five times, there is no such statement.

It's like those holy sons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, who have comprehended more than seventy-two extreme extreme paths, and it is impossible to refine them to seventy-two, which is almost unrealistic.

Ordinary half-step primordial ancestors will give up after refining to nine times, because they can only be tempered to this extent, the Saint Son-level half-step five-fold ancestor can probably be tempered to more than eighteen times, and the half-step five-fold ancestor who has comprehended one hundred and eight extreme extremes can only be tempered thirty-six times, which is almost the limit.

There was such a half-step fivefold ancestor who tried, and after that, he couldn't continue to refine it again.

Of course, a half-step fivefold ancestor like Ye Tian could be tempered many times, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate was not very clear.

However, once the tempering reaches a certain level, whether it can continue to be tempered or not, there is a feeling in the heart.

"If you want to temper the Pagoda of Will to the limit of the number of times, I'm afraid it will take a long time, but it doesn't matter, just temper it slowly, there will always be a day when it will be tempered to the limit. Once the Will Pagoda is tempered to the limit of the number of times, and then the Primordial Zhou Tian's body is refined, the speed will be very fast!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Somewhere in the Void Tooth Holy Gate, a majestic figure emerged, and the breath of the Fivefold Ancestor filled the endless time and space.

"Today, my Hundred Dust Origin Ancestor has broken through to the Five-Fold Origin Ancestor !!!"

Baichen Ancestor said excitedly.

Whew!!!

One by one, the Fivefold Ancestor appeared, congratulating this Hundred Dust Ancestor.

The Void Tooth Holy Gate has one more Fivefold Ancestor, which is nothing to the other Fivefold Holy Gates.

However, in the years that followed, the Void Tooth Holy Gate gave birth to one Fifthfold Ancestor after another, and in just 100,000 Primordial Realm years, eight Fivefold Ancestors were born one after another!

You must know that the entire Void Tooth Holy Gate has only more than three hundred Fivefold Origin Ancestors in total, and it has taken countless years, what is the 100,000 Origin Domain Era?

Of course.

The other Fivefold Holy Gates also guessed the reason, it must be that Ye Tian brought back a large number of Primordial Gold Beads from the Primordial Golden Domain, which could increase the success rate of those half-step Pentfold Primordial Ancestors attacking the Pentfold Primordial Ancestors.

There are too many half-step fivefold ancestors in the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and there are many half-step fivefold ancestors who used to be top saints, but later failed to break through, and have never had a chance to continue to break through.

Now that they have the Primordial Gold Bead, they can naturally break through 100%!

Of course, not every half-step fivefold ancestor can break through, there must be enough contribution, otherwise just a few primordial gold beads will not be able to give all the half-step fivefold ancestors.

Therefore, at this moment, in order to compete for the Primordial Gold Bead within the Void Tooth Holy Gate, the competition was also extremely fierce.

But all this has nothing to do with Ye Tian, he is still refining the Will Pagoda with peace of mind.

......

this day.

Ye Tian had a discussion with a fivefold ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, inadvertently showing the Primordial Treasure, and then spreading this picture through some channels.

Coupled with the explanation of the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor, many Origin Ancestors in the outside world thought that Ye Tian had only comprehended three hundred and sixty extreme extreme paths.

It doesn't matter if the other five-fold ancestors and half-step six-fold ancestors believe it or not, but they can be fooled for a short time, then it's okay.

And after dealing with this matter, Ye Tian continued to work hard to refine the Will Pagoda.

It's a pity that the speed of refining is getting slower and slower, and the time spent is naturally increasing.

Finally, the Void Tooth Holy Gate wanted to help Ye Tian quickly refine the Will Pagoda and reduce the time for cultivation.

After all, the Void Tooth Holy Gate also wanted Ye Tian to step into the realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor as soon as possible!

"Endless Ancestor, this is the primordial treasure of our Void Tooth Holy Gate - the Ten Rivers Diagram, which contains a special void inside, and the use of the Ten Rivers Diagram requires the consumption of the power of the Fivefold Ancestor, and if it is urged for a long time, even the Fivefold Origin Ancestor will not be able to bear it. Now, the Void Tooth Holy Gate has arranged a magic circle to replace the Five Ancestors to open the Ten Rivers Diagram, but it just costs more resources. The Ten Rivers Diagram is the Primordial Treasure of Combat Support, but it can be used to suppress the enemy's Will Pagoda and Extreme Will to the limit, and it can also be used to assist in refining the Pagoda of Will. Of course, this has never been done before, after all, it is too resource-intensive. But this time, for you, the Void Tooth Holy Gate is ready to use the Ten Rivers Diagram to help you cultivate, and let you complete the refining of the Will Pagoda as soon as possible!" said the Void Fang Holy Ancestor.

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Don't thank me, this is the treatment you deserve. The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said.

Immediately, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor took Ye Tian to a time and space, where the Ten Rivers Diagram was stored.

"Let's go inside!"

Void Tooth Holy Ancestor Dao.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded and escaped into the Ten Rivers Diagram.

At the same time, the Ten Rivers Diagram urged.

Rumble!!!!!

The terrifying suppression came, leaving Ye Tian's Will Pagoda and Extreme Dao Will in unimaginable suppression, while other aspects were not affected.

Ye Tian could easily mobilize the power of the Extreme Dao, and he could also cooperate with the Extreme Dao Quenching Technique to refine the Will Pagoda.

And under this kind of suppression, the Pagoda of Will is very easy to temper, and the effect is not known how many times better!

"Cultivate!"

Ye Tian didn't want to waste time and quickly tempered the Will Pagoda.

10th time!

Eleventh!

......

Under such a link, Ye Tian's refining effect was too good, and with the assistance of his own resources, in just sixty thousand Origin Domain Eras, Ye Tian directly refined to thirty-six times.

You must know that this is already the limit that the top Holy Son can refine.

However, Ye Tian could still continue to refine!
